stemHtml: Assuming no flow separation and no compressibility effects, the location of the aerodynamic centre of an aerofoil section:

options.a: moves backward when the angle of attack increases.
options.b: is at approximately 25% chord irrespective of angle of attack.
options.c: moves backward when the angle of attack decreases.
options.d: is at approximately 50% chord irrespective of angle of attack.
